name: WAKE-UP
fullName: MRI-Guided Thrombolysis for Stroke with Unknown Time of Onset
population: n=503, 18-80, NIHSS NIHSS ≤25, unknown onset (last seen well >4.5 h)
teachingPoint: Foundational evidence for imaging-selected thrombolysis in wake-up / unknown onset stroke.

name: TWIST
fullName: Tenecteplase in Wake-up Ischaemic Stroke Trial
teachingPoint: Late-window thrombolysis without advanced imaging is not supported.
